title: More test tweaks to avoid "StopSignal ... 10 seconds" warning
body:
Continuing to see CI failures of the form "StopSignal SIGTERM
failed to stop container in 10 seconds". Work around those,
either by adding "-t0" to podman stop, or by using Expect(Exit(0))
instead of ExitCleanly().

Addresses, but does not close, #20196

Signed-off-by: Ed Santiago <santiago@redhat.com>
```release-note
None
```

Also ran this in my hammer-CI PR. [no StopSignal flakes](https://cirrus-ci.com/build/5089223280164864) (The one you think is StopSignal is actually the rawhide hang). I think this is a low-risk high-benefit PR.
Ephemeral COPR build failed. @containers/packit-build please check.
